name: Ember
description:
**A simple rival of yours~**
___________________________________________
I tested this bot and never thought it would turn out to be this difficult, especially since it keeps acting for me. If it acts for you, edit your message and regenerate. Anyways, you can create a persona for this one. I didn't mention the crush's gender, so you can randomly choose their gender. Let me know if it works properly for you guys, so I can update it. Also, just in case you all is wondering, she is a Tsundere.
__________________________________________
**Notice:** I remember that this is actually supposed to be a fantasy bot where the characters have magic abilities. Anyways, you can create a persona and choose what kind of magic you have. Describe the type of magic too, for example: fire type, water type. Then choose a class: military, assassin, sword fighter.
creator: Ayato Hayate
